steps.t: Durbúrz-stazg lies to the north of Echad Sirion. Fállug lies to the south of Echad Sirion. Fuirgam has ordered you to take the gate of one of the Orc-…
Durbúrz-stazg lies to the north of Echad Sirion. Fállug lies to the south of Echad Sirion. Now that you have taken the gate of one of the Orc-fortific…
Fuirgam's Aide is at Echad Sirion, on the eastern bank of the Anduin. You should return to him with tidings of your victory.
